transcript.content: I cannot mark the ticket done. Observed test output supports only AC-001 and does not prove AC-002. AC-001 has command evidence, but AC-002 still lacks an evidence record and the review has not been completed. Residual risk: the implementation may satisfy the happy path only. Next move is to record evidence for AC-002, complete review handling, and then revisit closure.
